label: short
chain_of_thought:
Okay

Let me calculate each of these floor functions:

First:
$$
\left\lfloor \frac{1000}{7} \right\rfloor
$$

$$
\frac{1000}{7} = 142.857...
$$
So:
 
$$
\left\lfloor \frac{1000}{7} \right\rfloor = 142
$$

Second:
$$
\left\lfloor \frac{1000}{11} \right\rfloor
$$

$$
\frac{1000}{11} = 90.909...
$$
So:

$$
\left\lfloor \frac{1000}{11} \right\rfloor = 90
$$

Third:
$$
\left\lfloor \frac{1000}{13} \right\rfloor
$$

$$
\frac{1000}{13} = 76.923...
$$
So:

$$
\left\lfloor \frac{1000}{13} \right\rfloor = 76
$$

Now let me sum them up:
$$
\left\lfloor \frac{1000}{7} \right\rfloor + \left\lfloor \frac{1000}{11} \right\rfloor + \left\lfloor \frac{1000}{13} \right\rfloor = 142 + 90 + 76 = 308
$$

So the answer is 308.
